world.title: US says blockade 'completely halted' Iran's sea trade
world.description: The United States said its military had completely halted trade going in and out of Iran by sea, even though President Donald Trump said talks with Tehran on ending the war could resume this week.

world.title: RFAs: Albergo Diffuso for Sustainable Agro
world.description: Deadline: 04-May-2026 This initiative, led by Italian Agency for Development Cooperation in collaboration with UNESCO and FAO, promotes sustainable tourism in Battir through the Albergo Diffuso model. It focuses on preserving agro-cultural heritage, strengthening local entrepreneurship, and improving livelihoods. A €25,000 funding opportunity invites qualified service providers to train local beneficiaries and develop sustainable tourism

business.title: Top European Dividend Stocks To Watch In April 2026
business.description: As European markets rally following a U.S.-Iran ceasefire, investor sentiment is buoyed by the potential for reduced geopolitical tensions, with major indices like Germany’s DAX and France’s CAC 40 posting notable gains. In this environment of cautious optimism, dividend stocks can offer a compelling blend of income and stability, making them an attractive option for those seeking to navigate current market uncertainties while benefiting from consistent returns.

science.title: SpaceX launches two Starlink satellite groups 19 hours apart
science.description: SpaceX launched two Falcon 9 rockets 19 hours apart, both carrying batches of Starlink satellites. The liftoffs took place from Florida and California on Tuesday, April 14, 2026 (by local time zone).

science.title: New study suggests Neanderthals may have eaten outsiders, not their own group

science.title: The Satellite That Taught Us What We Were Doing to the Planet
science.description: Landsat 7 launched on April 15, 1999, designed to last five years. It operated for twenty-five, survived a failure that destroyed a fifth of every image it took, and became part of the longest continuous record of Earth's surface ever assembled. Then they made the data free.

ai.title: First Engineering: Introduces AI Velocity Pods for 3x Faster Product Delivery
ai.description: Bengaluru (Karnataka) [India] / Dover (Delaware) [US], April 15: In an industry where most software agencies still bill by the hour and profit from delays, Ailoitte, the AI-native product engineering company, today announced a fundamental shift in how software gets built and sold. The company is formally introducing AI Velocity Pods - a proprietary delivery model that pairs autonomous AI agents with senior human engineers inside outcome-based engagements - eliminating the traditional time-and-material billing model entirely.

ai.title: Eternal vs Swiggy: Quick commerce giants crash up to 32% in 2026 so far. Should you buy now?
ai.description: Shares of Eternal and Swiggy have fallen sharply in 2026 so far, down about 17% and 32%, amid inflation concerns, potential AI-led job losses, and fears of weaker discretionary spending. While analysts are weighing the risk-reward between the two, Eternal has shown some near-term recovery and strong long-term performance, delivering significant gains over the past three years.
